MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for a settlement conference this day. APPEARANCES: Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq., for plaintiff City Housing, Inc. Defendant Steven Collins in propria persona. The case settled. A Judgment pursuant to stipulation signed in open Court. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: D. Boffi; Reporter: Adonis Duffy, #12599
